\tzpentry{ID3648}{Photon Quantum Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3648 introduces Photon Quantum Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \langle T_{\mu\nu} \rangle_{\text{photon}} = \frac{\hbar\omega}{c^2} \langle \hat{a}^{\dagger} \hat{a} \rangle \left(k_{\mu}k_{\nu} - \frac{1}{2}g_{\mu\nu}k^2\right) \end{equation}
